title: 30cm Tall Glass Hurricane Vase, Storm Lanterns Candle Holder for Home Decoration Wedding Centerpiece
features: Hurricane Vases, Sometimes Known as Storm Lanterns
The tall, stylish design of our storm lantern makes it the ideal accessory to any home, garden & wedding venue, no matter the décor
Made from thick, high-quality glass this storm lantern is great value for money, the sturdy base is heavy and strong, perfect for preventing the candle holder accidentally falling
This unique glass votives bulk works great as a decorative table centerpiece to your everyday use home decor, party or wedding décor
Size: 17cm Diameter x 30cm Height, Quantity: 1 Hurricane Vase
description: The clear glass construction provides a clean, unobtrusive base for floral arrangements, candles, or filler materials. Popular with event planners and home decorators, it also works beautifully with our Richard Wenzel Church Candles, creating a soft, flicker-free glow. Use it as a statement piece or incorporate it into groupings for visual impact across tablescapes or display areas.
